summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cash Register feature in TechZone POS Settings page. All features working correctly - open/close shifts, transaction tracking (payout, drop, refund), cash sales integration, shift history, and difference calculation.
passed_tests: Cash Register tab appears in Settings page navigation
GET /api/cash-register/current - returns null shift when no shift open
POST /api/cash-register/open - opens new shift with opening amount
Cannot open duplicate shift - returns 400 error
POST /api/cash-register/transaction - records payout with negative amount
POST /api/cash-register/transaction - records drop with negative amount
POST /api/cash-register/transaction - records refund with negative amount
Invalid transaction type returns 400 error
Transaction without open shift returns 400 error
POST /api/cash-register/close - calculates difference correctly (over)
POST /api/cash-register/close - calculates difference correctly (short)
POST /api/cash-register/close - calculates difference correctly (balanced)
Close shift without open shift returns 400 error
GET /api/cash-register/history - returns closed shifts list
Current shift totals calculated correctly (opening + sales - payouts - drops - refunds)
Unauthorized access returns 401
UI: Open Shift form displays when no shift is active
UI: Current Shift dashboard shows totals (Opening Float, Cash Sales, Payouts, Expected Cash)
UI: OPEN status badge displayed for active shift
UI: Record Transaction form with Type dropdown (Payout, Safe Drop, Refund)
UI: Shift Transactions list shows all transactions with type badges and amounts
UI: Close Shift form shows expected amount and calculates difference in real-time
UI: Shift History collapsible section shows past closed shifts with status badges
Cash sales from Sales page automatically recorded in cash register when shift is open
Cash sale transaction shows in Shift Transactions with CASH SALE badge
seed_data_creation: Multiple test shifts created and closed during testing. Cash sale of $90 (iPhone XR Screen) recorded.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cash Register feature fully tested and working. All 6 API endpoints functional: /api/cash-register/open, /api/cash-register/close, /api/cash-register/transaction, /api/cash-register/current, /api/cash-register/history, /api/cash-register/daily-summary. Cash sales integration verified - when a cash sale is made via Sales page with an open shift, it automatically creates a cash_register_transaction record.

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/cash-register/current: Returns current open shift with transactions and totals
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/cash-register/close: Closes shift with closing_amount, calculates difference
